name: Herbed Salmon in Foil
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the salmon and pat dry.
2. Cut four pieces of heavy duty aluminum foil, 18 by 12 inches each.
3. Lightly coat the dull side of each foil square with cooking spray.
4. Place a dill sprig and a sorrel leaf on the lower half of one foil square.
5. Put a salmon fillet on top of the herbs.
6. Sprinkle chopped shallots, lime juice, and pepper over the salmon.
7. Add another dill sprig and sorrel leaf on top of the fillet.
8. Repeat steps 4-7 with the remaining ingredients.
9. Fold the upper half of the foil over the fillets, meeting the bottom edges, creating a 1/2-inch fold.
10. Fold again to seal the edges.
11. Place the foil packets on a baking sheet and bake at 400°F for 7 to 10 minutes.
12. Cut an "X" in the top of each packet and carefully open them.
13. Serve the salmon and herbs on warm plates.
